cmu.title: Central Michigan University
cmu.major: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

springboard.title: Springboard Cybersecurity
info: Completed a 50-lab cybersecurity analyst curriculum covering host hardening, network security, IAM, cryptography, SecOps, application-security testing, cloud risk, and vulnerability assessment.
Delivered a guided penetration-test capstone spanning reconnaissance, target scanning, vulnerability identification, threat assessment, and security reporting.

24g.title: Software Development Intern
info: Developed interactive expo activations for major brands including Salesforce, Waymo, and Essilor Luxottica (Oakley and Vogue).
Created the Oakley expo activation that Essilor Luxottica named their favorite of 4 experiences at the event, delivered as the first client assignment of the internship.

Served as the sole frontend developer on 4 experiential activations, coordinating directly with the Experiential Team Lead to take Vue.js interfaces from UI mockup to deployed production within 2–4 weeks each.
Implemented Pinia store and Vue Router patterns during the frontend team’s Vue 2-to-Vue 3 migration.
Built a full-featured analytics dashboard UI for an internal expo reporting tool, including data display and CSV export, that remained in active company use following the internship.
